results.notes: REJECTED — Wikipedia infobox image is File:USA_Wyoming_relief_location_map.svg (a location map, not a winter/ski photo). Strategy e1 requires infobox→Commons hero; map fails non-winter test even though the article body has strong winter signals. Try strategy e2 (article body image) or e3 (Commons category) in a later pass.

REJECTED — Wikipedia title 'Holiday_Valley' resolves to an Ohio census-designated place (CDP), not the NY ski resort. The disambiguation points to 'Holiday Valley (ski resort)' in Ellicottville, NY. Retry in a later pass using URL https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Holiday_Valley_(ski_resort) or https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Holiday_Valley_Resort.
